reason: Validates existing dark-first decision in /frontend-website skill. No actionable changes identified. See red team notes in conversation.
topic: Website Design: Light vs Dark Mode — Current Thinking & Industry Leaders

apple.key_insight: Uses light and dark within the same page as a scroll-based narrative tool

nike.approach: Dark-friendly brand language that works across both modes
nike.palette: Vivid red + stark black — inherently dark-mode compatible
nike.key_insight: Design system is mode-agnostic; brand identity is consistent regardless of mode
nike.result: 45% increase in user interactions with dark-forward campaign redesign

content_type.prefer_dark: Image-heavy, video-heavy, product showcases, visual portfolios

audience_and_devices.recommendation: Dark-first if audience skews mobile, gaming, dev tools, or creative software

accessibility.recommendation: Test both modes actively — do not rely on automated checkers alone

engagement_data.session_satisfaction: Improved for dark mode users, especially evening browsers
engagement_data.caveat: Some data reflects self-selection bias from tech-savvy users

development_cost.assessment: Worth it given engagement uplift; plan for it upfront

emerging_consensus.status: Dark mode transitioning from trend to expected standard
emerging_consensus.best_practice_2025_2026: Support both modes with system-preference detection as baseline; choose default based on brand category

implementation_tiers.standard: User toggle + remembered preference across devices
implementation_tiers.advanced: Mode as storytelling tool — intentional use of dark for drama, light for clarity within same experience

emerging_consensus.leading_edge: Brand systems fluid enough to use both intentionally, with smooth context-driven transitions

common_mistakes: Simply inverting colors without redesigning for each context
Mid-grey or muted text on dark backgrounds (legibility killer)
Problematic color combos: blue-on-black, dark green on navy
Following the trend without considering industry/audience fit
Not accounting for animations and hover states that behave differently in dark mode

design_trends_alongside_mode.motion_and_animation: Scroll-triggered animations, microinteractions — Apple, Nike, Airbnb leading
design_trends_alongside_mode.typography: Expressive, oversized, custom fonts taking center stage
design_trends_alongside_mode.color_2025_2026: Bright saturated palettes returning; neon gradients; earthy tones for sustainability brands
design_trends_alongside_mode.3d_and_ar: Mainstream — Nike (shoe try-on), Apple (product showcases), IKEA
design_trends_alongside_mode.personalization: Nike personalizes homepage by location/browsing history
design_trends_alongside_mode.maximalism_vs_minimalism: Both coexisting — Spotify/Liquid Death lean maximalist; Apple stays minimal

sources_consulted: altersquare.medium.com — Dark Mode Design for Startups 2025
